name: KWAOO, K-NET
notes:
K-net is a French telecommunications company, which provides internet,
landline, IP-TV and mobile phone services to consumers in France and Switzerland.

Thank in advance if you want to establish direct peering with us.

Kwaoo have a generally open peering policy but we will not setup a direct session if the traffic levels with your network are near zero and if we currently see your routes via various route-servers.
